title: Pedestrian dies after hit at N2 Hornlee turn-off
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A 34-year-old woman, believed to be from Plettenberg Bay, lost her life after being struck by a vehicle on the N2 at the Hornlee turn-off on Tuesday 13 January.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A 34-year-old woman, believed to be from Plettenberg Bay, lost her life after being struck by a vehicle on the N2 at the Hornlee turn-off on Tuesday 13 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Knysna Police have opened a culpable homicide and drunk driving docket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Preliminary reports indicate that police responded to the accident at about 08:10. \"Upon arrival, officers found a pedestrian who had sustained serious injuries after being hit by a Volkswagen Polo.","html":"Preliminary reports indicate that police responded to the accident at about 08:10. \"Upon arrival, officers found a pedestrian who had sustained serious injuries after being hit by a Volkswagen Polo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 34-year-old woman was declared dead on the scene by paramedics,\" said Southern Cape police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies.","html":"The 34-year-old woman was declared dead on the scene by paramedics,\" said Southern Cape police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The driver, a 47-year-old man, was arrested on the scene. Reports suggest the vehicle, carrying the driver and four passengers, was travelling from Plettenberg Bay to Knysna at the time of the accident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The suspect remains in police custody and will appear in court once formally charged,\" Spies said.","html":"\"The suspect remains in police custody and will appear in court once formally charged,\" Spies said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 47-year-old driver of the Volkswagen Polo was arrested on the scene.","html":"The 47-year-old driver of the Volkswagen Polo was arrested on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
